caption: A man with glasses, wearing a tall, pointed grey wig, a white dress shirt, a bow tie, and suspenders, is speaking into a professional microphone in a studio setting. He wears black over-ear headphones while talking. The background consists of a wall adorned with various framed photographs and a garment rack. A microphone is positioned in the foreground to the left. To the left and right of the man, on-screen logos appear: the left one reads "PODCAST" beneath a graphic, and the right one displays the red text "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, subtly shifting his facial expression and moving his mouth as he speaks. The camera remains stationary, capturing his upper body as he engages in conversation within the podcast environment.
